caption: I made these Go/No-go gauges on my @tormach Cnc mill. Client was a networking company. The gauges are meant to easily tell the difference between different sizes of BNC connectors.  That was a fun little project. #madewithtormach #tormach #cncmachining
I need help fixing my lathe.  I’m desperate. #manuallathe #machinist #machining
Made this prototype for a client in my CNC lathe!  Very satisfying to put it all together. #madewithtormach
A client asked me to make a hotend adapter plate for a 3D printer. It’s so tiny!  This was such a fun challenge.
Photo by Bullfrog Machining on February 04, 2023.
Knurling on a CNC machine!  Took some research to wrap my head around it but now I got it figured out!  #madewithtormach
Photo by Bullfrog Machining on January 23, 2023.

I was asked to fix a part on a golf cart that had been driven into a tree. I cut off the old bent part, machined a replacement, and welded it onto the original. A quick coat of paint and good as new. Let me know if I can fix anything for you! (Link in Bio to learn more) #recycle #welding #machining
Photo by Bullfrog Machining on January 19, 2023.
